name: Dark Red

name: Dark Sapphire

name: Dark Space

name: Deep Forest

name: Deep Green

name: Deep Indigo

name: Egg Toast

name: Egg Yolk

name: Egghead

name: Electric Blood

name: Electric Indigo

name: Illicit Darkness

name: Illicit Green

name: Illicit Pink

name: Illicit Purple

name: Illuminate Me

name: Illuminating

name: Imperial Ivory

name: Imperial Lilac

name: Imperial Purple

name: Imperial Red

name: Imperial Yellow

name: In Good Taste

name: In the Dark

name: In the Pink

name: In the Red

name: In the Shadows

name: In the Twilight

name: In the Vines

name: Inca Gold

name: Inca Yellow

name: Incense

name: Incision

name: Incubation Red

name: Indian Red

name: Indica

name: Indiglow

name: Indigo

name: Indigo Static

name: Indochine

name: Inferno Orange

name: Infinite Night

name: Infinity

name: Ink Black

name: Intergalactic Cowboy

name: Intergalactic Highway

name: Intergalactic Settlement

name: International Klein Blue

name: Into the Night

name: Irish Spring

name: Islamic Green

name: King Crimson

name: Kiss

name: Kitty Kitty

description: The bright, concentrated glow of a sun-ripened fruit just before it softens. It carries the tart, crisp energy of early summer orchards.

name: Young at Heart
description: A tender, flushed red reminiscent of a first crush or a candied cherry. It carries the sweetness of a Valentine's card and the softness of a baby's cheek.

name: Young Crab
description: The bright, translucent scarlet of a fresh shell plucked from a salt-sprayed tide pool.

name: Young Night
description: The charcoal hush of a city skyline just before the lamps flicker on. It carries the weight of wet pavement and cooling asphalt.

name: Young Salmon
description: A bright, translucent coral that mimics the soft underbelly of a fish darting through glacial currents.

name: Your Darkness
description: A heavy, ink-stained indigo that mimics the crushing pressure of the deep ocean or the void between distant stars.

name: Your Majesty
description: The heavy, velvet weight of a coronation robe draped across a stone throne. It carries the stillness of a deep-sea trench or a royal seal pressed into cold wax.

name: Your Shadow
description: A heavy, dampened blue that mimics the cool dimness of a concrete alleyway at dusk.

name: Yours Truly
description: A bright, creamy citrus hue like a handwritten note penned in peach-colored ink.

name: Yucca
description: Dry, waxy leaves of the desert shrub rendered in a dusty blue-green. It carries the stillness of a high-altitude scrubland under a bleached sun.

name: Yuma Gold
description: Sun-baked silt and shimmering heat haze over the Arizona desert. It glows with the intensity of a high-noon horizon.

name: Yuzu Marmalade
description: Bright and acidic, like a thick preserve of Japanese citrus glowing under a kitchen light.

name: Yuzukoshō
description: The tart, sun-bright zest of a Japanese citron. It carries the concentrated energy of a citrus rind pressed against a white ceramic plate.

name: Zen
description: Still and translucent, like the pale wash of a winter sky over a stone garden.

name: Zen Garden
description: Raked sand and pale, manicured moss under a soft morning mist.

name: Zen Garden Olive
description: Moss clinging to weathered stone lanterns in a silent Kyoto courtyard. It carries the damp, earthy weight of manicured shrubs under a heavy morning mist.

name: Zen Pebble
description: Smooth, sun-bleached stone resting in a raked sand garden. It carries the quiet, pale warmth of a morning fog lifting over a temple courtyard.

name: Zenith
description: The high, breathless clarity of a noon sky where the atmosphere thins into a pale, weightless blue.

name: Zeus’s Bolt
description: Searing and electric, this yellow strikes with the blinding intensity of a divine flash across a blackened Olympian sky.

name: Zinc
description: A neutral mid-tone gray with a cool lean, sitting between charcoal and silver.

name: Zombie
description: The pale, sickly hue of aged parchment or a faded hospital gown. It carries the wan, drained quality of skin under harsh fluorescent lights.

name: Zoodles
description: Pale and buttery, like spiralized summer squash tossed in a light emulsion.

name: Zucchini
description: Deep, matte green with a cool undertone, reminiscent of the waxy skin of a garden squash.

name: Zucchini Noodles
description: Pale and creamy, like a swirl of buttered pasta or the soft interior of a summer squash.

name: Zunda Green
description: A bright, creamy sweetness reminiscent of the mashed edamame dessert found in Japanese confectionery. It tastes of chilled spring air and crushed legumes.
